certificate.caveat: Interim validation. When operated in approved mode.
certificate.description: The IBM DataPower FIPS Provider provides a C language application program interface (API) for use by other applications that require cryptographic functionality.
testedConfigurations: CentOS Stream 8 running on IBM DataPower Gateway X3 with Intel Xeon Gold 6326 with PAA CentOS Stream 8 running on IBM DataPower Gateway X3 with Intel Xeon Gold 6326 without PAA
